content:
FINAL TASK — BUILD, INSTALL, TEST AND RELEASE IVX APK

PRIORITY: P0
MODE: EXECUTE NOW

The backend recovery is reported complete. Now finish the mobile production release end to end.

1. Confirm the latest production backend is live:
- GitHub commit SHA
- Render deploy ID
- deployed SHA
- /health HTTP 200
- Owner AI live message test PASS
- attachment upload PASS
- message persistence PASS

2. Complete final mobile cleanup:
- stabilize owner sign-in
- remove diagnostic/debug banners
- remove stale loading states
- remove development-only text
- confirm production API URLs
- confirm no Rork proxy dependency is required
- confirm no old AI gateway configuration remains

3. Run:
- dependency install
- lint
- typecheck
- unit tests
- integration tests
- Expo config validation
- Android production build

4. Generate a signed production APK:
- increment version/build number
- production environment only
- no development menu
- no debug logging
- no test credentials embedded

5. Install the APK on a real Android device and test:
- cold launch
- owner login
- logout and login again
- session persistence after restart
- Owner AI chat
- image attachment
- PDF attachment
- message persistence
- Main module
- Reels module
- Members
- Investors
- Properties
- Deal detail
- View Deal
- Invest Now
- notifications
- Android back button
- no infinite loading
- no crashes

6. Return proof:
- APK filename
- direct APK download link
- app version
- build number
- GitHub commit SHA
- Render deploy ID
- Android build ID
- build timestamp
- real-device model
- PASS/FAIL for every test
- screenshots of owner login and Owner AI chat
- remaining issues, or NONE

FINAL STATUS RULE:
Do not mark VERIFIED until the APK is installed on a real Android device and all critical tests pass.
